description:
Implement the core type representation following Castagna 2024 / Frisch-Castagna-Benzaken 2008 / Elixir's Module.Types.Descr.

A descriptor is a bitmap of basic types (atom, int, float, bool, nil, str, vec_i64, vec_f64, vec_u8, vec_bit, ...) UNION a DNF over structural parts (tuple shapes, list-of-T, function arrows). Top is all bits set + universal structurals; bottom is empty bitmap + empty DNF.

Deliverable: src/types.rs with Descr type, basic constructors, and a debug printer. No subtyping yet.

References:
- Castagna 2024, 'Programming with union, intersection, and negation types'
- Frisch/Castagna/Benzaken 2008, 'Semantic subtyping'
- Elixir's lib/elixir/lib/module/types/descr.ex
- CDuce
title: Type descriptor representation
